name: AI21 Jurassic-2 (Ultra)
note: AI21's 2023 flagship API model (renamed from Jumbo) with zero-shot instruction-following and multilingual support; now Legacy on Bedrock.
verificationNotes: Confirmed via ai21.com/blog/introducing-j2/ (published 2023-03-09): announces J2 Large/Grande/Jumbo family, 6 non-English languages (Spanish, French, German, Portuguese, Italian, Dutch) plus English = 7 total, and literally states 'J2 Jumbo ... an 86.8% win-rate on HELM by our internal evaluations' confirming the result row. Jumbo->Ultra renaming and AWS Bedrock's 8,192-token limit and 'Legacy' lifecycle status confirmed via AWS Bedrock docs and secondary sources. Current $18.8/M input+output pricing corroborated by independent pricing trackers. All fields left unchanged.
